Defines TypeError built-in object properties and identifiers for the JerryScript engine.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines macros and properties for the `TypeError` built-in object in a JavaScript engine. It specifies the object identifier for `TypeError` using the `OBJECT_ID` macro and defines a number property, `length`, with a fixed attribute using the `NUMBER_VALUE` macro. Additionally, it sets an object property, `prototype`, which points to the `TypeError` prototype object using the `OBJECT_VALUE` macro. The file uses conditional compilation to define macros if they are not already defined, and it concludes by undefining these macros to prevent conflicts with other code.
